response:
Subject: Request to Unblock Account – Suspicious Payments Issue  

Dear Google Support,  

I am writing to formally request the unblocking of my account, which was recently suspended due to suspicious payments that I did not make. I believe the issue stems from a misidentification of my account activity, and I would like to clarify that the payments in question were not initiated by me.  

I am a regular user of Google services and have never engaged in any fraudulent or unauthorized transactions. I am concerned that the suspension may have been based on incorrect assumptions about my account activity. I would appreciate the opportunity to provide additional information to resolve this matter.  

Please consider unblocking my account and restoring access to my services. I am ready to cooperate with any necessary verification steps.  

Thank you for your attention to this matter.  

Sincerely,  
[Your Name]
